name: ORourke Electric Inc
seoDescription: O'Rourke Electric, Inc. is a electrical contractor in Santa Rosa, CA, serving the North Bay and San Francisco Bay Area since 1981. IBEW-trained, state-licensed electricians for residential, commercial, and industrial projects, including panel and meter upgrades and EV charging. Call (707) 528-8539.

about.heading: Four Decades of Quality Electrical Work in the North Bay
body: O'Rourke Electric, Inc. has been providing quality electrical service since 1981. Founded by Daniel T. O'Rourke, who still serves as president, the Santa Rosa company has built its reputation on high-quality workmanship across residential, commercial, and industrial projects throughout the North Bay and greater San Francisco Bay Area.

The company's electricians and project managers are IBEW Local 551 trained and state certified, qualified to perform and complete projects with excellence and value. O'Rourke Electric is a Certified Small Business through the State of California Department of General Services and is a member of the North Coast Builders Exchange and the National Fire Protection Association. With CSLB license #682968 covering both Electrical and General Building work, the firm ranks in the top 3% of California licensed contractors.

O’Rourke Electric has earned the trust of Sonoma County families and businesses across the region. With more than 290 permitted projects on record and decades of experience keeping pace with evolving electrical, lighting, and green technologies such as EV charging, the team continues to deliver honest, responsive service.

servicesHeading: Electrical Services for Home, Business, and Industry

services.title: Residential Electrical
services.description: Full-service electrical work for homes across Santa Rosa and the North Bay, from troubleshooting and repairs to new wiring, lighting, and remodels.

services.title: Commercial Electrical
services.description: Reliable electrical installation and service for businesses, with licensed electricians and project managers who deliver on time and to code.

services.title: Industrial Electrical
services.description: Specialized industrial work including providing power to consolidated machinery and equipment for manufacturing and production facilities.

services.title: Panel & Meter Upgrades
services.description: Electrical panel replacements and meter upgrades to safely modernize your home or facility's electrical capacity.

services.title: EV Charging Installation
services.description: Installation of electric vehicle charging stations for residential, commercial, and large-scale parking facilities.

services.title: General Building Contracting
services.description: Backed by a General Building license, O'Rourke can manage broader construction and electrical scopes on a single project.

items.quote: O'Rourke Electric Inc is completing a job where I work that required their expertise in providing power to machinery that was consolidated into two areas.
